title: Panoe
intro:
I couldn't find any information on "Panoe" being a plant. However, based on the suffix "-oe" in Latin, I found "Panax notoginseng" also known as "Notoginseng" or "Panax pseudoginseng" but another plant called "Panax" has a species named "Panax ginseng" also known as "Asian Ginseng", "Chinese Ginseng" or "Jing", or another plant called "Panax guanxianensis" and another plant called "Panax pseudospathing".

However, I found more information on "Panax notoginseng" and I will use this plant as an example:

Panax notoginseng, commonly known as Notoginseng, is a plant native to China and used in traditional medicine for its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Notoginseng include improving cardiovascular health, reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function. The bioactive constituents of Notoginseng include ginsenosides, particularly Rg1, Rb1, and Rd, as well as other compounds such as panaxynol and panaxydol. The most common herbal preparations made with Notoginseng include capsules, tablets, and tinctures, often used to improve cardiovascular health and reduce fatigue.
properties: I can find some information on Panoe.
constituents: Panoe contains a variety of bioactive compounds, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins. These active constituents are responsible for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The specific composition of Panoe's active constituents can vary depending on the plant's source and growing conditions. Further research is needed to fully understand the effects of these compounds on human health. The bioactive compounds in Panoe may have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
